name: Dolibarr Blog
description: Latest news and updates from the Dolibarr ERP/CRM community.

blogs.title: Dolibarr was presented at Kigali
blogs.description: A presentation of Dolibarr ERP CRM took place in Kigali, showcasing the software to an international audience.

blogs.title: Dolibarr 24 Beta (Freeze)
blogs.description: The development team announced a feature freeze for Dolibarr version 24 beta, signaling the transition toward the official release phase.

blogs.title: Dolibarr DevCamp Spring 2026 Noisy le Grand
blogs.description: The spring developer conference for the Dolibarr community convened in Noisy le Grand, bringing together contributors and stakeholders.

blogs.title: Dolibarr ERP & CRM V23 has been released
blogs.description: Version 23 of the Dolibarr ERP/CRM became available to users, offering comprehensive business management capabilities.
